camera.noFrames: No frames in history yet — waiting for the camera to push.

pump.autoNote: Auto mode on — the schedule controls the pump. Switch to Manual on the Irrigation page to run it by hand.
pump.unreachable: Pump unreachable at {url} — check the node is powered and joined the AP.

waterStress.aiOfflineNote: AI service unreachable — showing last known estimate.

insights.pageIntro: Three advisory signals derived from your live sensors and camera: Water Stress — a rule-based risk estimate combining soil moisture with temperature & humidity (evaporative demand); Canopy Coverage — green-pixel cover measured from the latest frame by classical HSV vision; and Disease Detection — an on-demand PlantVillage CNN that classifies the current frame. All are advisory only and never actuate the pump.

pumpPanel.switchToManual: Switch to MANUAL to start the pump by hand

node.cameraAlt: Live feed near the irrigation node

schedule.title: Watering Schedule
schedule.noEntries: No schedule entries yet. Add one below.
schedule.saveFailed: Save failed — check the entries and try again.

common.errValue: Save failed — check the value and try again.
common.errValues: Save failed — check the values and try again.
common.errReachable: Save failed — is the web-server reachable?
common.errResetReachable: Reset failed — is the web-server reachable?

cameraSource.title: Camera Source Settings
cameraSource.desc: Configure where the Cameras page reads live stream and snapshot frames. Saved server-side and shared by every client.
cameraSource.help: Relay mode works best for this project. Use custom mode when you want to read directly from ESP32-CAM endpoints.
cameraSource.modeRelay: Current mode: relay. Dashboard status comes from /api/v1/camera/status.
cameraSource.modeCustom: Current mode: custom. Dashboard status is based on stream availability only.

cameraDevice.title: Camera Control (Device)
cameraDevice.desc: Behavior the ESP32-CAM pulls each cycle. Persisted server-side; changes apply within one snapshot interval.
cameraDevice.networkError: Network error — is the web-server reachable?

pump.title: Pump Control Settings
pump.desc: Configure the pump-zone node the dashboard commands via the web-server relay. Saved server-side and shared by every client.
pump.label: Label
pump.safety: Safety: turning the pump ON arms a server-side auto-off. The web-server switches the pump off after this timeout even if the dashboard is closed. Clamped to {min}–{max} minutes.
pump.reserveMac: Reserve this node's MAC in ap-server for a stable address in the .2–.99 band.

waterStress.title: Water Stress Thresholds
waterStress.desc: Tune the rule-based water-stress estimate (AI Insights). Soil bands set the base risk; the hot/dry and cool/humid pairs adjust it by evaporative demand.

canopy.title: Canopy Detection (HSV)
canopy.desc: Which pixels count as green canopy (AI Insights → Canopy). Watch the mask preview there while tuning. Hue in degrees (green ≈ 120°); saturation/value as %.

disease.title: Disease Detection
disease.desc: On-demand PlantVillage classifier (AI Insights → Disease). Below this top-1 confidence a result is reported as "inconclusive". Requires the model on smartfarm-ai.

about.title: About / System Info
about.desc: Build metadata baked into this dashboard at compile time.
